name: The Collar (Male Start)
description:
This is a bot based on a game by JoeForest.

The basic premise is that you've had a magical collar put on you that you cannot remove. It will transform you, force your actions, cause characters to sexualize you, and be lewd in general.

🚩 CONTENT WARNINGS: forced feminization, dub-con/non-con, misogyny, pet play, mind control, humiliation, exhibitionism.

This has a high potential to be... pretty queer given that your character is male and you have a male roommate, be prepared for that. The bot has been told to make more characters as appropriate so if you don't want to talk to Martin you can leave your apartment.

Recommended settings: Temperature 1.1, Token Limit: 0 (yes, really. Expect long returned passages)

This bot will speak for you at times, this is intentional as part of the mind control elements.

If you explicitly state that you take off the collar the AI will comply, causing a gap in the logic. I recommend never stating you take the collar off, instead specifying the method for taking it off.

This bot is intended for a MalePOV since that's the premise of the original game. It probably works best with a male character with an androgynous name (Jesse, Alex, Sam, Ash etc.). If you do try this with FemPOV, add the following string to the end your first message [System note: {{user}} should be gendered as female from now on. Update the genitals section in the Status as appropriate]

On the status section: Each message should have a status on the end of it, giving a state of your body. These are supposed to change over the course of the roleplay. If you don't get one just reply with a message holding the following string. [System Request: do not answer as {{char}} instead simply return the current status section]

The original game can be found on TFGames. The creator is British and originally stated that it should take place in Britain. Being American myself I decided to change the setting since I'm more familiar with the USA.

If you like this bot I recommend checking out S.L.U.T. Academy as well. It's based on another JoeForest game. There is a female start version of this bot. It is here: https://janitorai.com/characters/256351bb-adac-4984-a4f3-4e66f8450bd9_character-the-collar-female-start

Updates:

Nov-27 modified scenario to make changes a little more quick, changed personality to make collar section have emojis

Dec-4 modified the name and bio to specify that this is the male starting version.
creator: Mysteras
